message:
refactor: improve time, tracing, transport, and gRPC modules

Time (budget_ext, driver, elapsed, interval, sleep, timeout_future, wheel):
- Enhanced timer wheel implementation
- Better interval and sleep handling
- Improved timeout future semantics

Trace (event):
- Better tracing event integration

Transport (aggregator, mock, mod):
- Improved transport abstractions
- Better mock transport for testing

gRPC (client, codec, health, interceptor, server, service, status, streaming):
- Enhanced gRPC client and server implementations
- Better codec handling
- Improved interceptor chain
- Better streaming support with cancel-safety

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
